pages.text:
Ministry of Foreign Affairs

P.O. Box N-3746

NASSAU, Bahamas 8 May, 1997

• No. 440

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Commonwealth of The

Bahamas presents its compliments to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the

Republic of France and has the honour to announce that the Government of the Commonwealth of The Bahamas has

decided to adhere to the

Convention relating to international Exhibitions of 22 November, 1928 and to the Protocols of 16 November 1966 and 30 November 1972 and to the

Amendments of 24 June, 1982 and 31 May, 1988. In this regard attached , are the relevant Instruments of Accession by the Government of the

Commonwealth of the Bahamas.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Commonwealth of The

Bahamas avails itself of this opportunity to convey to the Ministry of

Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France, the assurance of its highest consideration.

Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Republic of France

AMBASSADE DE FRANCE

OYA PORT D'ESPAGHE

TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS MAY COME GREETINGS

Day of

WHEREAS, the Protocol to amend the Convention signed at Paris _on 22 November 1928 relating to International Exhibitions was done at

Paris on 30 November, 1972.;.

AND WHEREAS, in accordance with Article 2 of the said Protocol, the same is open to accession by Governments Parties to the 1928

Convention;

AND WHEREAS, the Government of the Commonwealth of The

Bahamas has acceded to the said 1928 Convention;

AND WHEREAS, the Government of the Commonwealth of The

Bahamas having studied the aforesaid Protocol is desirous to become a party to the same;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Commonwealth of The

Bahamas hereby accedes to the aforesaid Protocol and undertakes faithfully to abide by all the stipulations therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Janet G. Bostwick, Minister of

Foreign Affairs of the Commonwealth of The Bahamas have hereto set my hand and affixed my seal.

13th

DONE, at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Nassau, The Bahamas this.

Day of May

,1997.

lane of Dosterch

Janet G. Bostwick

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

COMMONWEALTH OF THE BAHAMAS
